name: one-from-many-visa-and-the-rise-of-chaordic-organization
description: Dee Hock's revolutionary concept of the chaordic organization — blending chaos and order — told through the creation story of VISA, where 25,000 competing banks cooperated through shared purpose and principles.
useCase: Understand chaordic organizational design — how purpose, principles, and distributed governance create adaptive, innovative organizations that outperform traditional hierarchies.
knownRisks: VISA-specific examples may not apply to all organizations
Chaordic concepts require significant cultural change to implement
Some may find the philosophy too abstract for practical application
